summary: Start M7 platform, resolution, and localization matrix validation after M7-UI-REGRESSION-MATRIX-001 closed on origin/main. The writer must validate Chrome, Edge, Firefox, Windows desktop smoke, supported resolutions, localization states, UI surfaces, and Electron boundary evidence without adding release, telemetry, accounts, cloud-save, commercial, sim-rule, save migration, or manual node battle scope.
decisions: Start the only dependency-ready M7 task selected by taskctl ready.
Preserve DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE and no active Human Gate.
Cross-browser/platform failures must be recorded as defects or scoped follow-ups; unsupported rows must not be faked.
risks: Edge/Firefox availability may depend on local Playwright/browser installation; unsupported rows need explicit evidence.
Desktop packaging and security checks are serialized because they share output directories.
requested_action: Implement matrix evidence and write writer REVIEW handoff for qa_reviewer.
